# Samad Elmakchi | Python Developer - Full Documentation

## Professional Summary

Professional Python Developer with over 20 years of experience in the technology ecosystem. Expert in Django, FastAPI, Flask, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Data Science and building intelligent systems. I believe in clean, documented and testable code following PEP8 standards, using Type Hints and Design Patterns in Python projects.

## Project Details

### Project 1: Automated Deployment with Docker + GitHub Actions
- **Category:** DevOps
- **Duration:** 2024
- **Technologies:** Docker, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, Supervisor, Systemd
- **Description:** With every git push on the main branch, the Python project is automatically tested, built and deployed on VPS with Docker. Reducing deployment time from 30 minutes to 2 minutes.
- **Highlights:** Multi-stage Dockerfile for 70% image size reduction, smart entrypoint.sh script, GitHub Secrets, Telegram notifications

### Project 2: Macroeconomic Indicators Forecasting
- **Category:** AI / Machine Learning
- **Duration:** 2023-2024
- **Technologies:** PyTorch, Statsmodels, XGBoost, Prophet, yfinance, Ray
- **Description:** Combining classical econometric models (VAR, ARIMA, GARCH) with deep learning (LSTM, Transformer) to predict gold, dollar and oil prices with higher accuracy.
- **Highlights:** Backtesting Engine, Market regime detection, Ensemble approach, Streamlit dashboard, InfluxDB storage

### Project 3: Unified Inbox for 6 Messengers
- **Category:** AI / NLP
- **Duration:** 2024
- **Technologies:** LangChain, ChromaDB, FastAPI, Telethon, instagrapi, Selenium
- **Description:** Automated receiving and responding from WhatsApp, Telegram, Instagram, Rubika, Bale and Eitaa using Generative AI (RAG) with conversation history.
- **Highlights:** Adapter Pattern, Conversation Memory, Local models, Persian language detection

### Project 4: Instagram Growth & Engagement Dashboard
- **Category:** Data Science
- **Duration:** 2023
- **Technologies:** Instagrapi, Pandas, Streamlit, Prophet, Transformers, ReportLab
- **Description:** Automatic retrieval of advanced metrics and actionable recommendations to improve content and increase engagement by up to 40%.
- **Highlights:** Sentiment Analysis, Best posting time detection, Weekly PDF reports, Influencer identification

### Project 5: WooCommerce Sales Management Dashboard
- **Category:** BI / Analytics
- **Duration:** 2023-2024
- **Technologies:** SQLAlchemy, Pandas, Streamlit, Prophet, APScheduler, Plotly
- **Description:** Direct connection to WooCommerce database and REST API, displaying key KPIs (AOV, Conversion Rate), sales forecasting and inventory alerts.
- **Highlights:** Abstraction layer, Net profit calculation, Sales forecasting, Inventory alerts, Excel/CSV export

### Project 6: AI-Powered Crypto Gem Hunter
- **Category:** AI / Crypto
- **Duration:** 2024
- **Technologies:** ccxt, XGBoost, TA-Lib, Redis, Streamlit, APScheduler
- **Description:** Automated scanning of newly listed coins with multi-factor analysis (technical, sentiment, social networks) to identify coins with at least 50% growth potential in 7 days.
- **Highlights:** ETL pipeline, Classification model, Scoring system, Pump detection, Telegram alerts

## Experience Details

### Senior Python Developer
- **Duration:** 2015 - Present
- **Responsibilities:** Web application development with Django, FastAPI and Flask. Implementation of microservices architecture, RESTful API, WebSocket and database optimization with PostgreSQL and Redis.
- **Achievements:** Reduced API response time by 40%, implemented CI/CD pipelines

### Machine Learning Specialist
- **Duration:** 2018 - Present
- **Responsibilities:** Design and implementation of deep learning models with PyTorch and TensorFlow for financial forecasting, sentiment analysis, recommender systems and NLP.
- **Achievements:** 25% improvement in forecasting accuracy

### Data Science Specialist
- **Duration:** 2016 - Present
- **Responsibilities:** Design of BI dashboards with Streamlit and Plotly, transactional data analysis with Pandas, building forecasting systems and automated reporting.
- **Achievements:** Automated 80% of reporting tasks

### Scrum Master & Product Owner
- **Duration:** 2014 - Present
- **Responsibilities:** Software team management with Scrum/Kanban methodology, using Jira, Confluence and Miro to improve development processes.
- **Achievements:** 30% increase in team productivity

### Automation & Deployment Specialist
- **Duration:** 2013 - Present
- **Responsibilities:** CI/CD pipeline design with GitHub Actions, containerization with Docker, VPS deployment and automation of repetitive processes with Python.
- **Achievements:** Reduced deployment time by 93%
